articles.title: Shibarium hits new TVL high with DAMN coin launch
articles.description: The Shiba Inu ecosystem’s layer-2 blockchain, Shibarium, has witnessed a new all-time high in its total value locked (TVL). The platform’s TVL has soared to an impressive $3.87 million. This surge marks a notable milestone, considering Shibarium’s TVL hovered below $1 million for the majority of the year.
